title: 50Pcs Purple Paper Plates - 9” Purple Disposable Plates Round Bulk Dinner Plates for Daily Use Holiday Picnic Celebrations Pruple Birthday Party Decorations
features: Large Package: It contains 50pcs purple plates and can be used by multiple people for family gatherings, ensuring there are enough for all guests. They're perfect family party supplies!

Quality Material: The purple dinner plates are crafted from food-grade materials that are safe and hygienic. The sturdy paper plates won't break or bend easily and can withstand large quantities of food. Thus, you and your guests can enjoy a great dining experience!

Easy To Use: Do you worry about cleaning up food scraps after every party? These purple plates can be directly thrown in the trash after the party without the need for washing, making your party more relaxing and enjoyable!

Special Design: These 9-inch paper plates are designed in the shape of a classic round plate. With an ideal size for serving a wide variety of foods, their minimalist and stylish design adorns your party table even more beautifully.

Wide Application: The paper dinner plates are suitable for a wide range of occasions. They are especially fitting for wedding, picnic, anniversaries, and birthday parties. Additionally, they can serve as supplies for other holiday parties or be used in daily life.
description: Our dinner paper plates are an ideal choice. Your family and your friends will appreciate the convenience and functionality these paper plates provide. Lightweight small plates make it easy to carry outdoors. They are especially suitable for outdoor activities and traveling. And they will never break, saving a lot of trouble.
